site.product_summary: Free Chrome extension to learn Japanese from anime (romaji-first cards, SRS, Listening Mode) plus Manga Studio and AI fan-ending manga (5-panel choose-your-ending).
site.stack: Next.js 16 App Router on Cloudflare Workers (OpenNext); blog in posts.ts; IndexNow

working: Dedicated exact-match money pages (Migaku/ManabiDojo pattern) — PR #52 merged, pages live 200
strategy.current_focus: Index manga-ending cluster: accurate funnel copy + AI manga ending generator URL + series long-tail blogs

hypotheses.change: New hub /fan-ending-manga with FAQ + HowTo JSON-LD; CollectionPage on /end
hypotheses.expectation: Hub indexed within 14 days; appears for 'fan ending manga' or 'choose your ending manga AI' in top 50 or AI overview citations
hypotheses.measure_via: web-search spot check | live-url fetch | search-console if available
hypotheses.outcome_notes: 2026-07-11: live HTTP 200; site:animevocab.com fan ending → no hits yet. Too early — keep open.

hypotheses.outcome_notes: 2026-07-11: not in site: yet. Doubling series blogs this run.
